self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can present Runtime handoff work more truthfully when follow-up stub status is derived from the live current head instead of the artifact filename alone.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result adds one shared resolver-backed status classification rule for Runtime follow-up stubs in the host read-model.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this slice, historical Runtime follow-up artifacts still appeared in the handoff list as pending-review work even after the live case head had moved downstream.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The operator-facing handoff list will stop overstating pending Runtime review work while preserving real pending follow-ups.

decision.rationale: This bounded stale-status slice adds immediate shared truth value without broadening into queue sync or frontend redesign.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
